## 💡 Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue.

## 🎯 Motivation and Context
Why is this change required? What problem does it solve?

## 📸 Screenshots (if appropriate)
Include screenshots or videos of the UI changes.

## ♿ UX & Accessibility Checklist
Please verify that your contribution adheres to the following standards:

- [ ] **Semantic HTML:** Used appropriate tags (button, nav, main, etc.)
- [ ] **Keyboard Nav:** All interactive elements are reachable and usable via keyboard
- [ ] **ARIA Labels:** Icon-only buttons and complex components have descriptive ARIA labels
- [ ] **Color Contrast:** Text and UI elements meet WCAG AA contrast ratios
- [ ] **Focus States:** Visible and clear focus indicators for all interactive elements
- [ ] **Responsiveness:** UI behaves correctly on different screen sizes
- [ ] **Loading States:** Async operations provide visual feedback (spinners, skeletons)

## 🧪 Testing
How did you test these changes?
